description: Categorical bars on one axis. Dependency-free SVG that reads the token layer directly, with a visually-hidden table of the same numbers.

labels.description: One label per bar, in the same order as `values`. A label with no value at its index is dropped.

values.description: The plotted data. One bar per entry; a negative value clamps to the baseline.

seriesLabel.description: Names the series for the accessible name, the table caption and its value column. Absent falls back to the chart type alone.

slot.description: One identity colour from the categorical ramp for the whole series. 1-based, clamped to the ramp, never cycled.

slots.description: Per-bar identity override, one ramp slot each. Wins over `slot`.

tone.description: Semantic colour, for a series that IS a state. Mutually exclusive with slot/slots — passing both warns in development and tone wins.

valueSuffix.description: Appended verbatim to every number the chart draws — the axis ticks, the tooltip and the accessible table. Carries its own leading space if one is wanted.
